description_long: This is a compact, rectangular microwave oven with a metallic body and bronze-colored accents. The front features a large door with a prominent bronze handle at the top center, and a control panel with several buttons and a rotary dial on the right side. The control panel is slightly angled outward for ergonomic access, and the door appears to have a darkened window area, possibly for viewing the interior. The sides and back are plain, with the right and left sides featuring horizontal ventilation slits near the top. The microwave stands on two short, sturdy feet, elevating it slightly above the surface. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for placement in kitchens, break rooms, or urban communal spaces.
description: A compact metallic microwave with bronze accents, a large front door, and a side control panel featuring buttons and a rotary dial. Ventilation slits are present on the sides, and the design is modern and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large door with a bronze handle, a dark window area, and the angled control panel with buttons and a rotary dial on the right.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying two horizontal ventilation slits and the protruding control panel knob.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain metallic surface and no visible features or openings.
description_view_3: Left side view with two horizontal ventilation slits near the top, mirroring the right side but without the control panel.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the right side of the front face, featuring a single large rotary dial and several small buttons arranged horizontally below the dial. The panel is slightly angled outward for easier access, and there are small icons or labels above the buttons, though no digital display is visible.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a prominent, curved bronze piece centered at the top of the door. It is horizontally oriented, wide enough for a comfortable grip, and appears to be made of plastic or metal with a glossy finish.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are located on both the left and right sides near the top, consisting of two horizontal slits on each side. No vents are visible on the front or rear surfaces.
attribute_window_presence: A dark, semi-transparent window is present on the front door, occupying most of the central area and allowing partial visibility into the microwave's interior.
